sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka hun Na khut sungah, Topa kong ap khin hi;
Ka lawmte le ka pum ka kha, Topa kong ap khin

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka hun Na khut sungah, Nang deihna bang hihen;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka hun Na khut sungah, patauh na’ng om ding hiam?
pa’n a mawkna-in Ata, khitui a luangsak diam?

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ka hun Na khut sungah, kong ap
Ka sih khit ciang na tak lamah, ka om tawntung ding hi.
